Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Light Rift Orb

Once in a while, launches a magic orb at the ally with the lowest health and at the enemy with the lowest health. When the orb hits an ally, it casts restoration on that ally. It removes a random debuff and restores 250000 (+bonus of spell power) health. It also increases the ally's damage by 50% and health by 25% for 5 sec. If an ally has less than 70% health after being hit by the orb, the orb explodes and restores 150000 (+bonus of spell power) health to the target and all allies in a small radius around it.
When the orb hits an enemy, it deals 185000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage to that enemy. If an enemy has less than 70% health after being hit by the orb, the orb explodes and poisons the target and all enemies in a small radius around it. The poisoned enemies take 150000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage for 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 25% per second.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
